summary: Pexels photo large and large2x rendition dimensions must be derived as aspect-preserving fits inside the documented size boxes, not as fixed landscape dimensions.
reason: Portrait photos served through Pexels large renditions are much narrower than the landscape nominal widths; using hardcoded dimensions makes resolution picking select URLs that do not actually meet requested width targets.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/pexels covers portrait originals where large is 325x650 and large2x is 650x1300, so an 800px width target falls back to original.
